film.title: Wilson
film.overview: Middle-aged and divorced, Wilson finds himself lonely, smug, and obsessed with his past.

dialogues.dialogue: Hey, a*****e! I'm talking to you.  Nobody has actual conversations anymore.  It's a real shame.  I mean, everybody's got something valuable to offer  if you just take the time to listen.
It's been really hard.  I had some bad years.  I am so... ...proud of you.  ...proud of you.  You're doing so good.
I had some bad years.  I am so... ...proud of you.  ...proud of you.  You're doing so good.  You're an amazing woman.
